title: BEM-600 internal audit pipeline
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
base=Path('governance/internal_contour'); base.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
audit_reports=base/'auditor/reports'; audit_reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
executor_inbox=base/'executor/inbox'; executor_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

checks=[
  ('canonical_protocol','governance/protocols/OPERATOR_DECISION_FORMAT_CANON.md'),
  ('structured_queue_protocol','governance/protocols/STRUCTURED_OPERATOR_DECISION_QUEUE.md'),
  ('renderer','scripts/operator_decision_pick.py'),
  ('routine_mailbox_picker','scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py'),
  ('operator_decision_json','governance/operator_decisions/bem584_decision_format_live_test.json'),
  ('curator_intake','governance/curator/inbox/operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json'),
  ('role_orchestrator_intake','governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/curator_operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json'),
  ('internal_task','governance/internal_contour/tasks/operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json'),
  ('analyst_plan','governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans/bem599_internal_analyst_decision_format_plan.json'),
]
results=[]
for name,path in checks:
    p=Path(path)
    results.append({'name':name,'path':path,'exists':p.exists(),'size':p.stat().st_size if p.exists() else 0})

# semantic checks
semantic=[]
renderer=Path('scripts/operator_decision_pick.py').read_text(errors='ignore') if Path('scripts/operator_decision_pick.py').exists() else ''
mailbox=Path('scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py').read_text(errors='ignore') if Path('scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py').exists() else ''
canon=Path('governance/protocols/OPERATOR_DECISION_FORMAT_CANON.md').read_text(errors='ignore') if Path('governance/protocols/OPERATOR_DECISION_FORMAT_CANON.md').exists() else ''
semantic.append({'name':'renderer_mentions_table','pass':'Таблица сравнения' in renderer and 'make_table' in renderer})
semantic.append({'name':'renderer_mentions_question','pass':'Вопрос:' in renderer})
semantic.append({'name':'mailbox_routine_no_telegram','pass':'notify_operator": False' in mailbox or 'routine_mailbox_no_telegram' in mailbox})
semantic.append({'name':'canon_short_table','pass':'short readable comparison table' in canon or 'Короткая' in canon})
all_pass=all(x['exists'] and x['size']>0 for x in results) and all(x['pass'] for x in semantic)
blocker=None if all_pass else {'code':'INTERNAL_AUDIT_FINDINGS','missing_or_failed':{'files':[x for x in results if not (x['exists'] and x['size']>0)],'semantic':[x for x in semantic if not x['pass']]}}
status='pass' if all_pass else 'failed'

audit={'schema_version':'internal_audit_report.v1','audit_id':'bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline','status':status,'question':'Does the operator decision pipeline satisfy BEM-599 acceptance criteria?','file_checks':results,'semantic_checks':semantic,'verdict':'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR' if all_pass else 'RETURN_TO_ANALYST','blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:02 (UTC+3)'}
audit_json=audit_reports/'bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.json'
audit_md=audit_reports/'bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.md'
audit_json.write_text(json.dumps(audit,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
audit_md.write_text('# BEM-600 | Internal Audit Operator Decision Pipeline | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:02 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Verdict'+sep+audit['verdict']+sep+sep+'## File checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['exists'] and x['size']>0 else 'FAIL')+' — '+x['path'] for x in results])+sep+sep+'## Semantic checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in semantic])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)

exec_req=executor_inbox/'bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.json'
exec_req.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'internal_executor_request.v1','request_id':'bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline','from_role':'auditor','to_role':'executor','status':'ready_for_executor' if all_pass else 'blocked','audit_report':str(audit_json),'objective':'Run selftest and finalize operator decision pipeline as production-ready canon.' if all_pass else 'Fix audit findings before executor handoff.','blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:02 (UTC+3)'},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

report=reports/'bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-600 | Internal Audit Operator Decision Pipeline | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:02 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Internal audit completed. Verdict: '+audit['verdict']+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline','cycle_id':'bem600-internal-audit-operator-decision-pipeline','source':'gpt_internal_auditor','status':status,'audit_report':str(audit_json),'executor_request':str(exec_req),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:02 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline']={'status':status,'verdict':audit['verdict'],'audit_report':str(audit_json),'executor_request':str(exec_req),'blocker':blocker}
state['internal_control_stage']='audit_passed_ready_for_executor' if all_pass else 'audit_failed'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 23:02 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-600 '+status.upper()+': internal audit completed. verdict='+audit['verdict']+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(audit_json),str(audit_md),str(exec_req),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Performed internal audit of operator decision pipeline and created executor request')
"""
No issue comments.
